focus.h2: Two environments. One approach to operations.
focus.lead: We build operational platforms for municipalities and sports organizations.
focus.caapDesc: A platform for municipalities that need real-time visibility, integrated data, and coordinated operations across teams and services.
focus.caapB1: • Manage territory and daily operations in one place
focus.caapB3: • Support decisions with live data and workflows
focus.vvDesc: A platform for planning, monitoring, and managing operations across venues, competitions, and large-scale sports programmes.
focus.vvB1: • Coordinate readiness across sites and timelines
focus.vvB3: • Structure reporting across teams and stakeholders

trust.h2: Built as products. Used in real operations.

trust.t3p: Cities, mobility, geospatial operations, and sports events.
trust.t4p: Built on Google Cloud and Google Maps Platform.

visuals.l1: Focus BC products give teams a clear view of what is happening and the tools to act on it.
visuals.l2: From maps and dashboards to workflows and reporting, everything is designed to support operational decisions.

hero.h1: A product company focused on cities and global sports events

hero.lede2: Our work is centered on visibility, coordination, and control in complex contexts where software needs to support real decisions and real operations.

metrics.m4d: Operational deployments and long-term product evolution

who.h2: We build software for operational teams, not for presentations
who.p1: Focus BC develops platforms for teams that need to understand what is happening, coordinate across people and systems, and act with confidence.
who.p2: Our work is focused on two demanding environments: municipalities and global sports events. In both cases, operations depend on timely information, shared visibility, and software that can support real-world decisions.
who.p3: We build products designed to evolve over time, support repeated use, and stay coherent as needs grow more complex.

build.h2: Two products for two operational environments
build.lead: Focus BC is built around two products, each designed for a clear operational context.
build.caapDesc: A platform for municipalities that need integrated data, real-time visibility, and coordinated operations across teams and services.
build.vvDesc: A platform for planning, monitoring, and managing operations across venues, competitions, and large-scale sports programmes.

howWork.p: We build platforms to support long-term operational value. That means making products that stay coherent, scalable, and useful as teams, workflows, and environments evolve.

howScale.h2: Strong products supported by the right partnerships
howScale.p: Focus BC continues to support deployment and product evolution, while working with partners where that helps extend reach and delivery capacity in the right way.

why.h2: Built for environments where software needs to support real decisions
why.c1p: Products designed for teams that need visibility, coordination, and structured workflows.
why.c2p: Platforms designed to evolve and scale across multiple use cases and clients.
why.c3p: Work across municipalities, mobility, geospatial operations, and sports events.
why.c4p: Google Cloud and Google Maps expertise supporting delivery and scalability.

tech.h2: Built on trusted geospatial and cloud foundations
tech.lead: Focus BC is a Google Premier Partner with expertise in Google Cloud and Google Maps Platform. These technologies support how we build and scale products across municipalities and sports environments.
tech.btn: Learn more about our Google partnership

hero.h1: Build products that matter in real operational environments
hero.lede1: Join a team building platforms for city operations and global sports events.
hero.lede2: Focus BC creates software used by teams that need visibility, coordination, and control in demanding environments. If you like practical work, product thinking, and real impact, you will feel at home here.

metrics.m2d: City operations and sports event environments
metrics.m3d: Platforms designed to evolve and scale over time
metrics.m4d: Clear thinking, real collaboration, and useful outcomes

why.h2: Work on software that is used in the real world
why.p1: Focus BC works on products that support municipalities, sports environments, and operational teams that need reliable software, not just ideas.
why.p2: That means working on platforms where the quality of design, code, workflows, and delivery actually matters. The goal is not to create more digital noise. The goal is to build software that helps people operate better.
why.p3: We value people who think clearly, work collaboratively, and care about building useful products that can keep improving over time.

expect.h2: A team environment built around useful contribution
expect.c1p: Collaborate across product, engineering, design, delivery, and commercial teams.
expect.c2p: Contribute to products designed to evolve, scale, and support long-term value.
expect.c3p: Work on software used in cities, geospatial operations, and major sports environments.
expect.c4p: Build your skills in a team that values initiative, clarity, and practical impact.

howWork.p: We build products to stay coherent, scalable, and useful in real operational environments. That requires strong design, solid implementation, and clear collaboration across teams.

howGrow.h2: A company built around long-term product value
howGrow.p: Focus BC is centered on product development and product evolution. We continue to support deployment and improvement, while keeping the quality of the product at the center of how we work.

roles.lead: Add your current openings here and keep the structure clear, practical, and easy to maintain.
roles.role1Desc: Help build and evolve Focus BC platforms used across municipalities, geospatial environments, and sports operations. Ideal for someone who enjoys practical engineering work and product-minded collaboration.
roles.role2Desc: Help shape product experiences that make complex operational workflows clearer, faster, and easier to use across Focus BC platforms.

hero.h1: Trusted Google expertise behind operational platforms and client solutions
hero.lede1: Focus BC is a Google Premier Partner and reseller of Google Cloud Platform and Google Maps Platform.
hero.lede2: Google Cloud and Google Maps are infrastructure we use to run and scale software. They support City as a Platform and Virtual Venue—they are not a separate product line from Focus BC.

metrics.m2d: Google Cloud Platform and Google Maps Platform
metrics.m3d: Operational platforms for cities and sports events
metrics.m4d: Technology partner and software platform builder

means.h2: A strong technology partnership with practical business value
means.p1: Our Google partnership matters because it combines delivery experience with direct access to leading cloud and mapping infrastructure. That foundation supports our platforms; it is not the client offer on its own.
means.p2: For clients, that means working with a team that can both advise on Google technologies and turn them into software platforms, data workflows, and operational environments that create real value.
means.p3: We do not approach Google products as standalone commodities. We use them where they make sense, either as part of Focus BC platforms or as direct client solutions supported through our reseller and implementation capabilities.

core.h2: Where Google technologies fit in our work
core.lead: We use Google products both as reseller offerings and as technology foundations behind the platforms we design and deliver.
core.c1p: Cloud infrastructure, scalability, and data services supporting reliable product delivery and client solutions.
core.c2p: Mapping, geospatial services, routing, visualization, and location-based experiences for operational use cases.
core.c3p: Google technologies supporting Focus BC products for municipalities and sports organizations.
core.c4p: Reseller capability combined with implementation support for clients who need trusted Google technology in practice.

context.h2: Supporting cities, geospatial workflows, and sports environments
context.lead: Google technologies play an important role in how Focus BC products and client solutions work in practice, especially where cloud reliability, mapping, and location intelligence matter.

products.eyebrow: How this connects to our products
products.h2: Google expertise inside Focus BC platforms and client projects
products.caapDesc: Google Cloud Platform and Google Maps Platform support the geospatial, operational, and data integration capabilities used in municipal environments.
products.vvDesc: Google technologies support mapping, scalability, and data-driven operations across venues, sports programmes, and event environments.

reseller.h2: Google products, backed by implementation and operational expertise
reseller.lead: Focus BC can support organizations not only through its own platforms, but also as a reseller of Google Cloud Platform and Google Maps Platform. This allows clients to combine technology procurement, implementation support, and operational expertise through one partner.

links.caseP: Explore how technology and products come together in real operational contexts.

cta.h2: Looking for Google products, platform expertise, or both?
cta.lead: Whether you want to explore Google Cloud Platform, Google Maps Platform, or understand how these technologies support Focus BC products and your own operations, we would be glad to talk.

editorial.p2: The goal is to publish selected content that strengthens authority, supports product positioning, and creates useful context for clients, partners, and future team members.

readout.p1: This page is designed to show where Focus BC creates value, which environments its products support, and what kind of operational problems the company is good at solving.
readout.p2: Each case study should connect clearly to one of the Focus BC products or to a practical operational challenge where data, workflows, and visibility need to work together.
